name: Kentucky Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix together all ingredients.
2. Dip your hand into the mixture and knead dough directly in the bowl until smooth and elastic.
3. Shape the dough into 6 patties of equal size, approximately 1-1/2 inches thick.
4. Place the patties close together in a Pam-sprayed 8-inch round baking pan.
5. Spray the tops of the patties with Pam cooking spray.
6. Bake at 450 degrees F (HOT) for 18-20 minutes, or until golden.
